Public Relations and Advertising

Career Opportunities

MENU

Public Relations and Advertising education offers our students and graduates a wide range of career opportunities across diverse fields within the communication industry. Graduates of our department are able to pursue careers in advertising agencies, public relations agencies, marketing communication and corporate communication departments of national and international companies, consulting firms, as well as public institutions and organizations.

In collaboration with the

Career Center of Istanbul Okan University

, students benefit from strong industry connections and gain access to various professional opportunities. Through these collaborations, our students are able to build and advance their careers in:

Advertising agencies

Public relations agencies

Marketing communication and related departments of international companies

National companies

Consulting firms

Public institutions and organizations

In addition, as part of the program, students complete a compulsory 30-working-day internship during their studies. This enables them to engage with the industry at an early stage and gain hands-on professional experience in areas of their interest. As a result, students have the opportunity to explore and shape their career paths while still continuing their education.
